rationale: Wrap the bridge in `assert(H ==> det_equal) by { ... }` so the implication propagates to the function postcondition (the prior attempt did its trigger work inside a bare `if H { ... }`, whose body doesn't feed back to the outer obligation), then re-fire well_typed_events foralls on both runs, expose the ok-gated `Self::next` / history / constants chain on each run, case-split on (ok1,ok2), and end with an explicit `assert(det_equal(...))` to force the final bridge.
